data.title: NBA Playoffs: Timberwolves vs. Nuggets Game 4 Betting Insights
data.description:
A recent monitoring by Odaily reveals that in the Polymarket prediction event for the NBA Playoffs Western Conference first-round Game 4 between the Timberwolves and the Nuggets, an account with a 63% win rate (address: 0x9495425feeb0c250accb89275c97587011b19a27) has invested $310,000 on the Timberwolves to win, with an average opening price of 48¢.

According to Odaily, the NBA Playoffs Western Conference first-round Game 4 between the Timberwolves and the Nuggets is set to begin at 8:30 AM (UTC+8) today. The current series score is 2-1, with the Timberwolves leading. The Nuggets' official injury report has updated Aaron Gordon's status (calf injury) to questionable. In the previous game, Aaron Gordon was absent due to injury, and the Nuggets lost to the Timberwolves 96-113.

data.title: An account with a 63% win rate purchased for $310,000. The Timberwolves defeated the Nuggets in Game 4 of the first round of the Western Conference playoffs.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer's monitoring, in the Polymarket prediction event for "NBA Western Conference First Round Game 4 Timberwolves vs. Nuggets," an account with a 63% win rate (address: 0x9495425feeb0c250accb89275c97587011b19a27) purchased $310,000 worth of bets on the Timberwolves defeating the Nuggets, with an average opening price of 48¢. Game 4 of the NBA Western Conference First Round playoffs between the Timberwolves and Nuggets will tip off at 8:30 AM Beijing time today. Currently, the series is 2-1, with the Timberwolves leading. The Nuggets' official injury report has updated, listing Aaron Gordon (calf injury) as questionable. In the last game, Aaron Gordon missed due to injury, and the Nuggets lost to the Timberwolves 96-113. Odaily Seer continuously monitors the prediction market, seeing changes before prices are set.

data.title: The probability of a US-Iran diplomatic meeting before April 29th on Polymarket has dropped to 16%, a 39% decrease in 24 hours.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer's monitoring, Polymarket data shows that the predicted probability of a "US-Iran diplomatic meeting before April 29th" has fallen to 16%, a brief drop of 39%. Market rules define a meeting as "yes" if US and Iranian representatives hold a formal diplomatic meeting before 11:59 PM ET on April 29th. A diplomatic meeting is defined as a formal meeting between representatives of both sides in an official capacity and with authorization, including indirect face-to-face meetings through mediators, but excluding brief greetings or chance encounters for non-diplomatic purposes. The meeting must be in-person and recognized by the government or reported by credible media. Odaily Seer continuously monitors the prediction market, seeing changes before pricing them in.

data.title: TRUMP Falls 14% Despite Donald Trump's Support for Crypto Industry
data.description: TRUMP experienced a 14% decline on Saturday, even as U.S. President Donald Trump expressed his support for the growth of the U.S. cryptocurrency industry. According to NS3.AI, during a speech to major token holders in Florida, Trump endorsed a bill intended to regulate the industry. The 45-minute address also touched on topics such as artificial intelligence, the conflict in Iran, and Trump-branded sneakers, as reported by two attendees and recordings provided to Bloomberg.

data.title: Trump's Crypto Support Fails to Boost Memecoin Value
data.description:
U.S. President Donald Trump's recent commitment to bolster the U.S. cryptocurrency sector did not translate into increased interest in his associated memecoin. According to Bloomberg, the token, known as $TRUMP, experienced a significant decline, dropping 14% on Saturday. This downturn occurred despite Trump's engagement with some of the largest holders of the token.

The president's efforts to promote the growth of the crypto industry were anticipated to have a positive impact on the value of $TRUMP. However, the market response was contrary to expectations, as the token's value decreased notably. Trump's interaction with key stakeholders in the memecoin did not manage to reverse the downward trend. The situation highlights the challenges faced by niche cryptocurrencies in maintaining investor interest, even when backed by high-profile endorsements. The decline in $TRUMP's value underscores the volatility and unpredictability inherent in the cryptocurrency market, where external factors can significantly influence token performance.

data.title: ECB Collaborates with Standards Bodies for Digital Euro Infrastructure
data.description: The European Central Bank (ECB) has entered into agreements with three European standards organizations to develop the digital euro using open, non-proprietary payment infrastructure. According to NS3.AI, this framework incorporates CPACE for contactless payments, nexo standards for merchant and ATM connectivity, and Berlin Group rules for account-based transfers. The ECB believes this approach could lessen dependence on Visa and Mastercard. However, the widespread adoption of the digital euro across the euro area will still hinge on the implementation of relevant regulations.

data.title: Litecoin Chain Reorganization Following MWEB Exploit
data.description:
Litecoin experienced a significant chain reorganization after attackers exploited a zero-day vulnerability in its Mimblewimble Extension Blocks (MWEB) feature. According to NS3.AI, the reorganization affected blocks from 3,095,930 to 3,095,943. The Litecoin Foundation revealed that the flaw allowed older mining nodes to accept invalid MWEB transactions, facilitating unauthorized peg-outs and routing funds to third-party decentralized exchanges.

Aurora Labs CEO Alex Shevchenko noted that attackers leveraged this vulnerability to execute double-spending attacks against multiple cross-chain swap protocols, with NEAR Intents exposure estimated at approximately $600,000. The Litecoin Foundation confirmed that the offending transactions were removed and the vulnerability has been fully patched. Despite these measures, some trading venues reported financial losses due to the exploit.

data.title: Trump Warns Bankers Against Hindering Cryptocurrency Legislation
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has issued a warning to bankers regarding the obstruction of cryptocurrency legislation. According to ChainCatcher, Trump made these remarks during a cryptocurrency conference, emphasizing the importance of allowing the legislative process to move forward without interference.

data.title: Alchemy CEO Highlights Crypto's Suitability for AI Agents
data.description: Alchemy CEO Nikil Viswanathan has emphasized the advantages of cryptocurrency for AI agents over human users. According to NS3.AI, Viswanathan pointed out that crypto's global nature, constant availability, and programmability make it ideal for software agents operating online. In contrast, traditional finance is limited by banking hours, geographical constraints, and the need for physical identity, which can hinder the efficiency of AI-driven transactions.

data.title: Ethereum Price Movements Could Trigger Significant Liquidations
data.description: Ethereum's price fluctuations are poised to impact liquidation levels on major centralized exchanges. According to ChainCatcher, data from Coinglass indicates that if Ethereum surpasses $2,421, the cumulative liquidation intensity for short positions on mainstream centralized exchanges will reach $493 million. Conversely, if Ethereum falls below $2,212, the cumulative liquidation intensity for long positions will amount to $482 million.

data.title: Oil Shock May Influence Federal Reserve's April Meeting Amid Inflation Concerns
data.description: A potential oil shock driven by geopolitical tensions could complicate the Federal Reserve's meeting scheduled for April 28–29. According to NS3.AI, this development may revive inflation concerns just before the release of first-quarter GDP and March PCE data on April 30. The situation could exert pressure on Bitcoin if oil-induced price pressures lead the Fed to maintain a cautious stance, reinforcing expectations for prolonged higher interest rates.

data.title: Data Breach at Southern Illinois Dermatology Exposes Over 160,000 Individuals' Information
data.description: Southern Illinois Dermatology has disclosed a cybersecurity breach that potentially exposed the personal and protected health information of 160,312 individuals. According to NS3.AI, the company revealed that some of its network systems were compromised in November 2025. The affected files may have contained sensitive data, including names, Social Security numbers, contact details, and medical record numbers. The incident underscores the growing concerns over data security in healthcare institutions.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Anthropic's Mythos Urges Crypto Security Teams to Address Infrastructure Weaknesses
data.description: Anthropic's Mythos is encouraging crypto security teams to expand their focus beyond smart contracts to address infrastructure vulnerabilities that are often overlooked in traditional audits. According to NS3.AI, this shift in focus is crucial for enhancing the overall security of blockchain systems. Aave Labs has already integrated AI into its security processes, utilizing it for simulations and code reviews in conjunction with human auditors.

data.title: Solana Foundation to Introduce AAVE to Its Network
data.description: Lily Liu announced that the Solana Foundation is lending USDT to Aave as part of a recovery initiative. According to NS3.AI, the foundation aims to integrate AAVE into the Solana network by this weekend.

data.title: OCC Issues Indefinite Ban on JPMorgan Chase Banker for Alleged Embezzlement
data.description: The Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) has issued an indefinite prohibition order against Shaira Ahmed, a JPMorgan Chase associate banker, following accusations of embezzling $73,200 from customer accounts. According to NS3.AI, the OCC stated that Ahmed manipulated JPMorgan Chase records over approximately two months to conceal the theft. Ahmed agreed to the order without admitting or denying the allegations.

data.title: Bitcoin Experiences Slight Decline Following U.S. President Trump's Announcement
data.description: Bitcoin's price decreased by approximately $100, reaching $77,351 late morning on the U.S. East Coast. According to NS3.AI, this movement occurred after U.S. President Donald Trump announced the cancellation of a planned trip to Iran by Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner. Witkoff and Kushner were anticipated to visit Pakistan for a new round of discussions involving Iran. The modest decline indicates that markets perceive this development as a short-term risk signal.

data.title: BLESS Token Experiences Significant Price Drop Following Large Sales
data.description:
On April 25, a new address (0xa6a...1323) received 99 million BLESS tokens from a cross-chain bridge, valued at approximately $654,800 at the time. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, the address quickly began selling small amounts of the tokens, causing the price to drop by over 10% in a short period.

Previously, on April 16, the Bless project team sold 300 million BLESS tokens, valued at $3.83 million, leading to a 71% price decline. Of these, 200 million tokens were sold on a centralized exchange (CEX), and 100 million were sold on the BSC chain.

On April 20, the project team continued to sell, transferring 100 million BLESS tokens, valued at $600,000, from the SOL chain to the BSC chain for sale. To date, they have sold 37.84 million BLESS tokens in exchange for 334 BNB, valued at $210,000.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Cancels Envoys' Trip to Pakistan and Iran
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump announced the cancellation of the planned trip of Presidential Envoy Brian Hook and his son-in-law Jared Kushner to Pakistan and Iran. According to Odaily, the decision was made on the same day as the announcement. The trip was intended for negotiations with the two countries. Further details regarding the cancellation have not been disclosed.

data.title: Trump says he has canceled Witkov and Kushner's trip to Pakistan.
data.description: US President Trump announced that he had canceled the trip for his special envoy Witkov and son-in-law Kushner to Pakistan for negotiations with Iran. (CCTV News)

data.title: Former Pastor Indicted for Fraudulent PPP Loan Applications in Florida
data.description: Federal prosecutors in Florida have indicted former pastor Marcus Eichelberger on four counts of wire fraud related to fraudulent Paycheck Protection Program (PPP) loan applications. According to NS3.AI, the charges allege that Eichelberger and another individual falsely claimed the loans were intended to support a business but instead used the funds for personal expenses. The fraudulent activities reportedly resulted in approximately $50,000 in government losses. Additionally, the accused sought loan forgiveness after misusing the proceeds.
